summary: Aisha Johnson (CSM) met with Stephanie Blair from Nova Retail ahead of their end-of-next-month renewal to assess account health. Stephanie expressed significant frustration stemming from a six-hour Aegis Detect outage on March 10th, ongoing compliance reporting pain in Aegis Comply, dashboard signal-to-noise issues, and a slow support ticket resolution. She disclosed that Nova is actively evaluating competitor SentinelShield, having completed two demos. Aisha acknowledged accountability, outlined technical remediation steps taken post-outage, previewed the upcoming Aegis Comply v2 launch with on-demand compliance reporting, and committed to a set of concrete follow-up actions to help Stephanie rebuild confidence for the renewal.
actionItems: Aisha Johnson: Set up Aegis Comply v2 preview environment for Stephanie and her compliance lead Sarah before the renewal decision
Aisha Johnson: Pull and personally resolve the unresolved January support ticket regarding Detect alert signal-to-noise from Stephanie's SOC analyst
Aisha Johnson: Prepare a written summary of Detect remediation steps and updated SLA commitments for Stephanie's CISO
Aisha Johnson: Loop in account executive to explore commercial flexibility and set up a pricing conversation with Stephanie

keyMoments.text: Stephanie reveals the six-hour Detect outage left Nova with zero threat visibility across 200+ retail locations, calling it a liability and a direct challenge to justify the spend to her CISO.
keyMoments.speaker: Stephanie Blair

keyMoments.text: Stephanie discloses Nova has had two demos with competitor SentinelShield and is close to requesting a formal proposal, citing compelling uptime SLAs.
keyMoments.speaker: Stephanie Blair

keyMoments.text: Aisha reveals Aegis Comply v2 launching April 7th with on-demand PCI DSS, HIPAA, SOC 2, and ISO 27001 reporting, directly addressing Stephanie's major compliance pain point, and offers a preview environment.
keyMoments.speaker: Aisha Johnson

keyMoments.text: Stephanie acknowledges that alert signal-to-noise concerns were raised with support in January and never satisfactorily resolved, highlighting an ongoing product and support gap.
keyMoments.speaker: Stephanie Blair
